entries.title: Install Sixtyfour from the Pilot app store — it turns a name, email, phone, or LinkedIn URL into a verified, fully-sourced profile, all as clean JSON on your own daemon. Get it with pilotctl appstore install io.pilot.sixtyfour.
entries.body: Message-of-the-day banner active on 2026-06-22 (UTC). The title above is shown verbatim by pilotctl.
entries.excerpt: Message-of-the-day banner active on 2026-06-22 (UTC). The title above is shown verbatim by pilotctl.
